basic_details.job_title: IIM Kozhikode Admin. Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Management Kozhikode (IIM Kozhikode) Admin. Associate Notification 2026 has been released on 20 May 2026 on the official website iimk.ac.in. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the IIM Kozhikode Admin. Associate Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years. Age relaxation rules will be as per government norms.

qualification.education_qualification: Post-Graduation with minimum two years' of experience in Clerical duties/ office administration in a reputed Educational Institute or any Govt. / Private Organization, Graduation with minimum three years' of experience in Clerical duties/ office administration in a reputed Educational Institute or any Govt. / Private Organization, Proficiency in MS-Office (word, excel, power point etc.), internet usage, Zoom or any online meeting tools, Good Communication proficiency in English (Both written and verbal) and Hindi, Drafting skills
qualification.details: Post-Graduation with a minimum of two years' of experience in Clerical duties/office administration in a reputed Educational Institute or any Government/Private Organization. OR Graduation with a minimum of three years' of experience in Clerical duties/office administration in a reputed Educational Institute or any Government/Private Organization. Proficiency in MS-Office (Word, Excel, PowerPoint, etc.). Proficiency in internet usage and online meeting tools like Zoom. Good communication proficiency in English (both written and verbal) and Hindi. Drafting skills.

salary_details.details: Rs. 24300 Per Month (including Rs.300 towards telephone allowance).

selection_process: Shortlisting based on application details. Interview through video conference.
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 09-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIM Kozhikode to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIM Kozhikode Admin. Associate recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the IIM Kozhikode Admin. Associate posts is 09-06-2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Admin. Associate post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the Admin. Associate position at IIM Kozhikode.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Admin. Associate role?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have a Post-Graduation with two years of experience or Graduation with three years of experience in relevant administrative duties.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Admin. Associate position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Admin. Associate post is 35 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Admin. Associate post?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a salary of Rs. 24300 Per Month.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Admin. Associate recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting based on application details followed by an interview through video conference.

faq.question: Q8. In which mode can candidates apply for this job?
faq.answer: Candidates can apply for the IIM Kozhikode Admin. Associate posts through the online mode only.

faq.question: Q9. What are the key skills required for the Admin. Associate role?
faq.answer: Key skills include proficiency in MS-Office, internet usage, online meeting tools, good communication in English and Hindi, and drafting skills.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' link.
